_comments.critical_versions: DO NOT upgrade next, eslint, eslint-config-next, firebase-admin without checking DEPLOYMENT.md
_comments.next: Max 15.5.14 - Firebase Frameworks preview only supports Next.js 12-15.0. Next 16+ causes 500 errors in Cloud Run production
_comments.eslint_config: eslint 9.39.4 and eslint-config-next 15.5.14 MUST match next version. ESLint 10+ uses different flat config format incompatible with Next 15. See eslint.config.mjs for FlatCompat wrapper usage
_comments.firebase_admin: 13.7.0+ supports Application Default Credentials. Code falls back to ADC in Cloud Run (no env var), uses service account key locally (.env.local). See src/lib/firebaseAdmin.ts
